Package com.csl.intercom.cslscan

Class ApiHandler

java.lang.Object
com.csl.intercom.cslscan.ApiHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ApiHandlerForCSLAutoCrypt, DbapiHandlerForCSLAutoCrypt, ScanApiHandler
public class ApiHandler extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Class to handle communication for API client.

      public void setApiKey(String apiKey)
      Adds a header to the api request
      Parameters:
      apiKey - apiKey for the connection

    • downloadFilePost

      public JsonApiResponse downloadFilePost(String endpoint, Json body) throws Exception
      Downloads a file from the given endpoint (from POST method)
      Parameters:
      endpoint - endpoint to fetch the file
      body - body needed for the fetch
      Returns:
      a Json Object with the fields : {"Content-Type":"...", "Content-disposition":"...", "Content":"..."}
      Throws:
      Exception - if it couldn't fetch the file from the module

    • downloadFileGet

      public JsonApiResponse downloadFileGet(String endpoint, Json params) throws Exception
      Downloads a file from the given endpoint. (from GET method)
      Parameters:
      endpoint - endpoint to fetch the file
      params - parameters needed for the fetch
      Returns:
      a Json Object with the fields : {"Content-Type":"...", "Content-disposition":"...", "Content":"..."}
      Throws:
      Exception - if it couldn't fetch the file from the module

    • downloadFile

      public JsonApiResponse downloadFile(org.eclipse.jetty.http.HttpMethod method, String endpoint, Json params, Json body)
      Downloads a file from the given endpoint.
      Parameters:
      endpoint - endpoint to fetch the file
      body - parameters needed for the fetch
      Returns:
      a Json Object with the fields : {"Content-Type":"...", "Content-disposition":"...", "Content":"..."}

    • sendDelete

      public JsonApiResponse sendDelete(String endpoint, Json params)
      Send a DELETE HTTP request to the scanner.
      Parameters:
      endpoint - The endpoint on the API to use.
      params - The parameters to send, if any (if not, should be an empty Json object, not null).
      Returns:
      The response to the request.

    • sendDelete

      public JsonApiResponse sendDelete(String endpoint, Json params, Json body)
      Send a DELETE HTTP request to the scanner.
      Parameters:
      endpoint - The endpoint on the API to use.
      params - The parameters to send, if any (if not, should be an empty Json object, not null).
      Returns:
      The response to the request.

      public JsonApiResponse sendRequestToApiQuiet(org.eclipse.jetty.http.HttpMethod method, String endpoint, Json params)
      Send an HTTP request to the scanner.
      Parameters:
      method - The HTTP method to use (GET, POST, PUT, ...)
      endpoint - The endpoint on the API to use.
      params - The parameters to send, if any (if not, should be an empty Json object, not null).
      Returns:
      The response to the request.

      Parameters:
      method - The HTTP method to use (GET, POST, PUT, ...)
      endpoint - The endpoint on the API to use.
      params - The parameters to send, if any (if not, should be an empty Json object, not null).
      Returns:
      The response to the request.
